themes.reasoning_notes: Cheap Aura that buffs your creature and is castable in Aura-focused decks; enchantment-destruction rider is incidental utility.
Acts like a small combat boost with upside, but only at sorcery speed and mainly as an Aura rather than a true trick.
Directly interacts with enchantments by sacrificing itself to destroy one after combat damage, giving niche enchantment synergy.
Aura payoff piece for Voltron/Aura shells: one-mana enchantment that buffs your creature and can cash itself in after combat to remove an opposing enchantment.
